evidence.summary: H1 page showed Gold Standard Safe Harbor, Platform Standards, Managed by <bug-bounty-platform>, Collaboration Enabled, Retesting, 9 in-scope bounty-eligible assets, production signup requirement for @researcher-alias.example, and production X-<bug-bounty-platform>-Research header guidance.
Production signup page exposes Email, Password, marketing checkbox, SIGN UP button, Google signup, Apple signup, login link, T&C and Privacy links. No form submission performed.
UAT signup page exposes Email, Password, marketing checkbox, SIGN UP button, Google signup, Apple signup, login link, T&C and Privacy links. No form submission performed.

evidence.source: UAT Next.js static bundle loaded by create-account page
evidence.summary: UAT frontend config includes NEXT_PUBLIC_BASEAPI_URL=https://api-uat-bugbounty.nonprod.<program-slug>.com and signup flow references /auth/signup, MFA/email verification OTP endpoints, and reCAPTCHA Enterprise signup action. This is candidate routing info only, not proof.

evidence.source: Single root GETs with X-<bug-bounty-platform>-Research header where applicable
evidence.summary: api-uat-bugbounty.nonprod.<program-slug>.com root returned JSON 404 Requested resource not found; mark8.<program-slug>.com root returned JSON 401 Unauthorized; api.<program-slug>.com root returned Cloudflare challenge 403. No auth, fuzzing, scanning, or customer data involved.
